records.stderr_pattern: cannot find module providing package|go: module .* found .* but does not contain
records.description: go module not found — enable module-aware mode to auto-download

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "go: no required module provides package github.com/example/pkg" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: missing go\.sum entry for module|go\.sum: checksum mismatch
records.description: go.sum incomplete or mismatch — disable sum check and enable mod download

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "go.sum: missing entry for module providing package golang.org/x/text" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: cannot find package|no required module provides package
records.description: Package not found — set GOPATH to writable dir and enable module mode

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "cannot find package \"github.com/myapp/util\" in any of:" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: go: updates to go\.sum needed, disabled by -mod=readonly
records.description: go.sum update blocked by readonly mode — switch to mod=mod to allow updates

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "go: updates to go.sum needed, disabled by -mod=readonly" >&2; exit 1'
